category_sources: source_facts.description describes libpng as a library for manipulating PNG images.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official libpng pages identify the project as libpng.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official libpng page and links to the official libpng manual.
repo_sources: Official libpng development site states the Git repository is available at GitHub under pnggroup/libpng and SourceForge.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PNG image manipulation; official libpng page describes it as the PNG reference library.
